name: capella-document-search
description: Document search application for Capella scopes and collections. Built with Bun, Svelte, and SvelteKit.
author: Simon Owusu

scripts.dev1: NODE_DEBUG=http BUN_CONFIG_VERBOSE_FETCH=true cp .env.development .env 2>/dev/null || true && bun run svelte-kit sync && bun --bun vite dev
scripts.dev: cp .env.development .env 2>/dev/null || true && bun run svelte-kit sync && bun --bun vite dev
scripts.build: NODE_ENV=production LOG_LEVEL=info bun run svelte-kit sync && bun --bun vite build
scripts.build:docker: bun run svelte-kit sync && bun --bun vite build
scripts.build:no-telemetry: LANG=C.UTF-8 LC_ALL=C.UTF-8 LC_CTYPE=C.UTF-8 VITE_BUILD_LEGACY=true VITE_BUILD_SSR=true VITE_BUILD_CJS=true NODE_ENV=production bun --bun vite build
scripts.build:dev: bun run svelte-kit sync && cp .env.development .env 2>/dev/null || true && NODE_ENV=development bun --bun vite build
scripts.docker:dev:build: bun run docker:cleanup:dev && VERSION=$(grep '"version"' package.json | head -1 | cut -d'"' -f4) && docker rmi capella-document-search:dev 2>/dev/null || true && DOCKER_BUILDKIT=1 docker build --build-arg NODE_ENV=development --build-arg BUILD_VERSION=${VERSION}-dev --build-arg COMMIT_HASH=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD || echo 'local') --build-arg BUILD_DATE=$(date -u +'%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ') -t capella-document-search:dev .
scripts.docker:dev: bun run docker:dev:env && bun run docker:dev:build
scripts.docker:dev:run: bun run docker:cleanup:dev && VERSION=$(grep '"version"' package.json | head -1 | cut -d'"' -f4) && docker run --name capella-search-dev -p 3000:3000 -e NODE_ENV=development -e BUILD_VERSION=${VERSION}-dev -e COMMIT_HASH=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD || echo 'local') -e BUILD_DATE=$(date -u +'%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ') capella-document-search:dev
scripts.docker:prod:build: bun run docker:cleanup:prod && bun run docker:build
scripts.docker:prod:run: bun run docker:cleanup:prod && VERSION=$(grep '"version"' package.json | head -1 | cut -d'"' -f4) && docker run --name capella-search-prod -p 5173:3000 --read-only --tmpfs /tmp:noexec,nosuid,size=100m --cap-drop=ALL --security-opt=no-new-privileges:true -e NODE_ENV=production -e BUILD_VERSION=${VERSION} -e COMMIT_HASH=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD || echo 'production') -e BUILD_DATE=$(date -u +'%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ') capella-document-search:latest
scripts.docker:prod: bun run docker:prod:env && bun run docker:prod:build
scripts.docker:prod:restart: bun run docker:cleanup:prod && bun run docker:prod && bun run docker:prod:run
scripts.docker:clean: bun run docker:cleanup:dev && bun run docker:cleanup:prod && docker system prune -af && docker volume prune -f
scripts.docker:dev:restart: bun run docker:cleanup:dev && bun run docker:dev && bun run docker:dev:run
scripts.docker:cleanup:dev: docker stop capella-search-dev 2>/dev/null || true && docker rm capella-search-dev 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.docker:cleanup:prod: docker stop capella-search-prod 2>/dev/null || true && docker rm capella-search-prod 2>/dev/null || true
